Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 7-Network 500-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan7_500.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 500 parcels aligned to 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan7_500()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan7_500()
#> 
#> ── yan7_500 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 500
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 500 × 3
#>     hemi  region                            label                               
#>     <chr> <chr>                             <chr>                               
#>   1 left  7networks_LH_Default_FPole_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_FPole_1     
#>   2 left  7networks_LH_Default_FPole_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_FPole_2     
#>   3 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1       
#>   4 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2       
#>   5 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_3        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_3       
#>   6 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_4        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_4       
#>   7 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_5        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_5       
#>   8 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_6        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_6       
#>   9 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_7        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_7       
#>  10 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_8        lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_8       
#>  11 left  7networks_LH_Default_PCC_1        lh_7networks_LH_Default_PCC_1
